message:
test(fcp-conformance/credential): pin CredentialId UUID + CredentialApplication wire-format (br-mwehp)

CredentialId is the UUID-backed handle and CredentialApplication is
the 8-variant NORMATIVE enum that tells the egress proxy HOW to
apply credentials to outbound traffic. The serde tag format and
per-variant payloads are wire contracts every credential consumer
depends on. Zero conformance coverage today.

Adds 17 tests against the public fcp_core API:

- credential_id_serde_transparent_via_uuid_string (bare UUID
  string, no wrapping object — forward compat with bare-UUID
  JSON readers)
- credential_id_from_uuid_round_trips_with_as_uuid
- credential_id_parse_accepts_valid_uuid_string
- credential_id_parse_rejects_non_uuid_string (3 reject paths)
- credential_id_default_yields_distinct_random_ids (Default
  delegates to new — random)
- credential_id_new_yields_distinct_random_ids
- credential_id_display_round_trips_with_parse
- credential_id_debug_includes_uuid_string (observability)
- credential_id_ordering_is_total (BTreeSet/BTreeMap usability)
- credential_application_http_bearer_serde_format ({"type":
  "http_authorization_bearer"} — snake_case rename pinned literally)
- credential_application_http_basic_serde_format
- credential_application_http_header_with_prefix_serde
- credential_application_http_header_omits_prefix_when_none
  (forward compat with pre-prefix readers)
- credential_application_query_parameter_serde
- credential_application_unit_variants_round_trip (6 unit
  variants)
- credential_application_generic_variant_serde
- credential_application_unknown_variant_in_json_is_rejected
  (defensive — must NOT silently match a known variant)

All 17 pass locally in <0.01s via cargo test -p fcp-conformance --test
credential_id_application_conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
